item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 29min There you have it: CBS says the final round of the Masters was its most watched i
item.description:
Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 29min There you have it: CBS says the final round of the Masters was its most watched in 11 years with 13.995M viewers (Nielsen Big Data + Panel)
Last year averaged 12.990M (no Big Data added).
Sunday's peak was at 20.049M, the largest since 2013 Sports Business Journal 7 13 34 3 mil

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 19min En respuesta a @JoshACarpenter Saturday was just more than 8.1M on CBS, the most
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 19min En respuesta a @JoshACarpenter Saturday was just more than 8.1M on CBS, the most for the third round since 2019 3 582

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 20min There were probably many more watching on the app. Cita Phil Casey @pcaseysafc ·
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 20min There were probably many more watching on the app. Cita Phil Casey @pcaseysafc · 25min En respuesta a @JoshACarpenter y @SBJ So 14m people going “where’s that gone?” on 18? 2 910

item.title: PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 26min The art of the tee shot with Si Woo Kim 2 1 58 22 mil
item.description: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 26min The art of the tee shot with Si Woo Kim 2 1 58 22 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 26min JUST IN — CBS Sports announces viewership of 13.99M for Sunday’s final round of The Maste
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 26min JUST IN — CBS Sports announces viewership of 13.99M for Sunday’s final round of The Masters. It’s the highest figure in 11 years and the audience peaked at 20M.
(Via @JoshACarpenter ) 4 7 113 8 mil
